headline: Voss Capital on Its Core Long Position Sempra (SRE)
summary: Voss Capital, LLC, an investment management company, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Voss Capital’s funds, Voss Value Fund, LP, and the Voss Value Offshore Fund, Ltd returned -11.4% and -11.5%, respectively, to investors net of fees and expenses, in the first quarter compared to a […]
